mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username AS username, u.password AS password_hash, r.role_code AS role_code, 'ADMIN' AS identity_type, NULL AS member_id, COALESCE(u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ENABLED' AND r.role_code = 'ADMIN' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND (u.username = #{username} OR u.phone = #{username}) LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username AS username, u.password AS password_hash, binding.identity_type AS role_code, binding.identity_type AS identity_type, binding.identity_ref_id AS member_id, COALESCE(member_account.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name FROM sys_user u JOIN user_identity_binding binding ON binding.user_id = u.id AND binding.deleted = 0 AND binding.status = 'ENABLED' AND binding.identity_type = #{identityType} JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_code = binding.identity_type AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ENABLED' LEFT JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND (u.username = #{username} OR u.phone = #{username}) ORDER BY binding.is_default DESC, binding.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT u.id AS user_id, 'ADMIN' AS identity_type, COALESCE(u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name, 'ENABLED' AS status, 1 AS default_identity, NULL AS member_id FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ENABLED' AND r.role_code = 'ADMIN' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND (u.username = #{username} OR u.phone = #{username})
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id AS user_id, binding.identity_type AS identity_type, COALESCE(member_account.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name, binding.status AS status, binding.is_default AS default_identity, binding.identity_ref_id AS member_id FROM sys_user u JOIN user_identity_binding binding ON binding.user_id = u.id AND binding.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND (u.username = #{username} OR u.phone = #{username}) ) identity_rows ORDER BY default_identity DESC, FIELD(status, 'ENABLED', 'PENDING', 'REJECTED', 'DISABLED'), identity_type ASC

SELECT DISTINCT menu.id AS id, menu.parent_id AS parentId, menu.menu_name AS menuName, menu.path AS path, menu.component AS component, menu.icon AS icon, menu.permission_code AS permissionCode, menu.sort_no AS sortNo, menu.visible AS visible FROM sys_role role JOIN sys_role_menu role_menu ON role_menu.role_id = role.id JOIN sys_menu menu ON menu.id = role_menu.menu_id AND menu.deleted = 0 AND menu.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE role.deleted = 0 AND role.status = 'ENABLED' AND role.role_code = #{roleCode} AND menu.menu_type = 'MENU' AND menu.path IS NOT NULL AND menu.path != '' ORDER BY menu.parent_id ASC, menu.sort_no ASC, menu.id ASC
